rationale: Precise 8h funding rates and open interest for XLM perpetuals are gated behind Coinglass Pro/paid tiers; 30-day rolling correlations against BTC, ETH, and NASDAQ require either a paid data API (CoinGecko Pro, Messari) or manual calculation from raw OHLCV downloads — none of these values are surfaced as ready-made figures on the free public pages of Coinglass, CoinGecko, DefiLlama, or FRED as of the current date.

sources.note: XLM perpetual funding & OI visible in summary table on free page, but real-time 8h decimal values and full OI breakdown require Coinglass Pro subscription; free page shows truncated/delayed data without exportable precision.

CoinGecko free tier provides OHLCV history downloadable as CSV (up to 365 days) but does NOT compute or display rolling correlations natively; calculation would require manual work in Python/Excel from raw data — NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER as a ready figure.

FRED carries NASDAQ Composite index data (NASDAQCOM series) but provides no crypto price data or cross-asset correlation tools; pairing with XLM requires manual merge — NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER as a ready figure.
DefiLlama covers Stellar TVL and chain metrics but does not publish derivatives positioning or correlation data.
